behavior_summary: Provides the 'U8P_HELMET::look' (examine) handler for the helmet item. When the player examines the helmet it displays a short text/bark 'helmet '.
Implemented as a short process (processType 0x0208) that displays the text and then suspends/ends the U8P_HELMET::look process.
Item metadata indicates this is an armor item with armourClass = 4, so this object represents a helmet-type armor piece in-game.
notable_control_flow: U8P_HELMET::look executes as a process triggered by the engine's U8P_HELMET::look/examine action for the item.
The function emits a single Bark (player-facing text) and then performs a suspend/terminate of the process; there is no branching, menu interaction, or external calls.
open_questions: Is the trailing space in the displayed string 'helmet ' intentional or an artifact of extraction?
Does the engine perform any implicit equip/inspection bookkeeping when this U8P_HELMET::look process runs, beyond the displayed text (no evidence in script)?
Exact semantics of the suspend node (timing/yield vs. immediate termination) are not explicit in the extracted JSON.

main_function.name: U8P_HELMET::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the player's 'U8P_HELMET::look' (examine) action for the helmet item by presenting a short descriptive text.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player examines or 'looks at' the helmet item (engine U8P_HELMET::look/examine event for this item).

function_map.name: U8P_HELMET::look
function_map.role: Look/examine handler that emits a one-line description ('helmet') and suspends the process.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides the 'U8P_HELMET::look' (examine) handler for the helmet item. When the player examines the helmet it displays a short text/bark 'helmet '.
